steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun phrase Mathematician Grigori Perelman (the parenthetical “in conjunction with...” modifier doesn't change this). The blank precedes the past participle credited, and needs an auxiliary verb.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires a singular verb to match Perelman, so is provides the correct singular present form.

The other choices violate agreement: are and are being are plural, while have been uses plural conjugation instead of singular has been.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
